title: Empogona reflexa
taxonomy: Empogona reflexa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family. It belongs to the genus Empogona, which is a group of plants found primarily in tropical Africa. Empogona reflexa is further classified within the subfamily Ixoroideae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The species is native to the tropical regions of Africa, where it grows in the wild. Further classification of Empogona reflexa includes its placement within the tribe Psychotrieae, a group of plants characterized by their complex inflorescences.
